title: dacrydium distichum
intro: Dacrydium distichum, also known as the Dacrycarpus distichus or the Upland Borneo Pine, is a species of coniferous tree in the family Podocarpaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Dacrydium distichum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
